entry.title: Re: Create transport requests from Features in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi Moritz

Great Blog, thank you for sharing. 

Is there a possibility that the customizing documentation is created automatically based on the transport requests? Or does it still have to be updated manually? It would be great if the integration in CALM could be used here. Unfortunately, the customizing documentation in the projects is always of poor quality and is usually never kept up to date. With the transport requests as BAsis, these could also be created automatically.

Thanks for your thoughts

Regards Michael

entry.title: Re: Volunteering and the Importance of Giving Back
entry.content: Thank you so much @KatherineKenneally for your kind words. It was a pleasure taking part in this event alongside you. I truly believe that each of us has a responsibility to give back to our community in any way we can, and it’s a privilege I don’t take for granted. A huge thank you to Junior Achievement Ireland for the incredible work they do and the lasting impact they have on young people’s lives, it was such an amazing day!

entry.title: Cannot receive Order Confirmation Request linked from Ariba in scope item 42k in S/4 Hana Cloud
entry.content:
I have a question about the Hana Cloud-ARIBA integration in scope item 42K

Currently, I am able to integrate purchase orders created in Hana Cloud with the business network (buyers and suppliers).

However, when the supplier executes order confirmation for a linked purchase order, an error occurs when it is received on the Hana Cloud side.

Error Message 'S4 system response is FAILED and ErrorCode:NA and ErrorResponse: .. Suggested Action : Document failed to deliver to S4HANA System. ErrorCode:CIG-PLT-00649.'

Do you know the cause of this error?

Transaction Tracker

entry.title: Print and download a Spool (more than 99 pages)
entry.content:
Goodmorning, 

I am writing because I am facing the following problem: 

I have to print a very large output, so to avoid time-out error I have to execute the transaction in background. 

Executing in backgroup I obtain a spool, so far so good. 

The problem is that to covert in PDF the spool and dowload it I have to run the 2 programs RSTXPDFT4 and RSTXPDFT5 but the program RSTXPDFT5 cannot be run in background so I have to stay hours waiting for it finishes the download! 

Is there another solution applicable? Maybe using a specific output device when we create the spool?
We are open also to make a customization but I have no clear where intervene. 

thanks

entry.title: A letter to Otto – PM of the EarlyWatch Alert. I love you Otto
entry.content:
Dear Otto,

I'm writing this letter, although I suspect you might never read it, you might be gratefully retired in Mallorca or Turks and Caicos, with my heartfelt thank you.

We never met, but I've been working with SAP systems for many years, and let me tell you something, everything lives and dies really fast in SAP, everything except the EWA. We must recognize it, your product is incredible, lasting impact of the meteorite that killed the dinosaurs and created SAP, and the world was created.

I still remember the first time I saw your report, I am not that old so it was mid 2000s, but your EWA report felt revolutionary. I was looking for your instructions, and they were given in a SIM file.

You remember SIM? it was a kind of a video, SIMulator, that SAP gave as instructions, because Youtube didn't exist. Otto, given the complexities, you communicated with us, your messages were heard. No interactions, but the community existed.

Otto's Business Plan, I didnt need more

 

Otto, enough said, we were in the business with you!

Wait a minute

I will do what I can, give me a few years and I catch up

Your report was optimized for Word Perfect 6.0 but... Perfect

I gotta say, all in blue, black and white seemed in line to the user experience of mySAP.com, it was enough for us, because the data was 101% accurate, not a comma could be taken out.

All this has evolved, See how it looks today

130 pages of color graphics! pure gold, factual facts. Germany engineering at its best, hard to find these days.

Yes Otto, All changed in my SAP life... except your weekly emails. SAP asks me to log in a portal called SAP for Me (yes, there are still "Portals"), but I still receive your emails in my inbox, for those that still have inbox.

My ask to you - Help the PM of "Readiness Check"

Otto, we need your help, if you were Bruce Wayne, I would turn my Batman Sign high enough to catch your attention.

The world needs your help with the "SAP Readiness Check" for S/4HANA.

In 2025, 20+ years after you created that incredible thing, we are using another report from SAP for assessing the readiness of a system for a major migration.

I have to be honest, Otto, sometimes interacting with the Readiness Check feels... well, let's just say it doesn't quite have the elegance and clarity that EWA achieved. Looks like this.

Welcome to 2025

 

Otto, your UX intuition is needed. This makes me wonder – wouldn't it be fantastic if you, or at least the principles you embedded into EWA, could somehow connect you with the current SAP Product Manager overseeing the Readiness Check? Perhaps some of that EWA magic – that focus on clarity, actionable insights, and user-friendly presentation of complex data – could help refine Readiness Check into the indispensable tool we need to bring our customers back to the future?

Maybe you were ahead of your time, but You, Otto, were a pioneer of automated, data-driven, factual reporting long before "AI" became the dominant buzzword.

We talk so much today about Artificial Intelligence generating reports and insights, but you built a system that did exactly that, reliably and effectively, using smart logic, deep system knowledge, and deterministic analysis nearly 25 years ago.

So, Otto, wherever you are, thank you. Thank you for your vision, for your contribution to the SAP ecosystem, and for creating a product that has stood the test of time and helped countless professionals keep their SAP systems healthy. SAP EarlyWatch Alert is more than just a report; it's a legacy of pragmatic innovation.

With deepest respect and gratitude,

Mario

entry.title: Re: Step-by-Step Instructions for Effortless Electronic Documents Implementation with TCI
entry.content:
Hello @mate_csak , 

Thanks you for this very useful explanation ! 

We are currently installing the TCI:  3545430 - Transport-Based Correction Instructions (TCI) for the Electronic Document Processing Framework 
Simplifying SAP Note Implementation with TCI for E... - SAP Community

At step 4 we have the dialog indicating whether rollback is possible or not. Unfortunately, for the moment, this is not the case on our side. We have verified that all the prerequisites indicated in the pdf of the note 2187425 - Information about SAP Note Transport based Correction Instructions (TCI) - SAP for Me

The PDF states: If you update the system or if you import a transport request where already the TCI is implemented, you cannot roll back the TCI. (page 19)

We currently have Framework 36 manually installed, as well as the Peppol solution (core,germany peppol and email, belgium). Unfortunately, Framework is not properly installed and old notes are not implemented (following the first installation of the framework in 2020) that's why we want to install the TCI to be on a clean base. This TCI was never installed before. 

Does the fact of already having the Framework and Peppol in the system mean that the TCI considers this to be an “update” and therefore rollback is not possible?

We prefer to secure the installation of this TCI since it will overwrite everything that has been implemented manually. We'll also make a backup of the dev system, but if rollback can be active, that would be better.

If you have any other advice for this situation, we'd certainly appreciate it.

Thanks for your help.

Best regards

Guillaume.

entry.title: ITS
entry.content:
Hi, I have a problem with ITS.
I created a program that at a certain moment calls the method  cl_gui_frontend_services=>gui_upload.

Then I created with se80 the service internet with the html template to connect it with this program and at the end I created through SICF the service related.

When I launch the service on the web and the program has to call the upload a screen appears with these sentences:

"Upload local file in sap system
Wait automatic transfer
Page inserted for technical reasons"

entry.title: BYD2502 Disable password lock restrictions for technical users
entry.content:
You would like to lift the password lock restrictions for technical users.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: BYD2502 Disable password lock restrictions for techni...
entry.content: As per SAP Global Accounts and Passwords Security Standard policy, “ To avoid the possibility of guessing passwords, six (6) incorrect attempts are allowed when entering passwords. If this maximum is exceeded, the account must be locked.”

entry.title: Re: Migrating ValueMappingReplication from SAP PI/PO to CPI
entry.content:
Hi,

we are actually evaluating the Edge Integration Cell (EIC) with regards to future PO migration project.

For a specific PO integration scenario including Value Mapping Replication we are actually implementing a PoC scenario on EIC analogue this SAP blog.

In general the described mechanism is working but at last step the POST DeployValueMappingDesigntimeArtifact API call deploys the value mapping to Cloud Integration instead to Edge Integration Cell.

Is there a possibility to control deployment target by choosing runtime profile (Cloud Integration or Edge Integration Cell) or does SAP plan to provide this feature in future?

Example POST call:

https://{{cpi_tmn_host}}/api/v1/ValueMappingDesigntimeArtifactSaveAsVersion?Id='{{valuemapping_id}}'&SaveAsVersion='active'

With this feature we would be able to migrate productive value mapping replication PO OnPremise-to-OnPremise scenario with same automated functionality to Edge Integration Cell.

BR,

Tobias Miller

entry.title: Hide columns in Overall Release of Purchase Requisitions screen via My Inbox app
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I would like to seek for advice on how to hide a column in the Overall Release of Purchase Requisitions screen in My Inbox app. I am able to add 4 columns (Asset Number, Internal Number, GL Account and Cost Center) by using CDS View extension. After adding the columns, I was requested to hide one column (Connected Material) as the table now looks squished and that particular column is not in use. However, I am unable to use CDS Metadata extension because there is no annotation to allow metadata extension in the CDS C_PurRequisitionItemFs. Is there any way I could hide the column? Any advice would be appreciated. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Connecting user ids to Employees
entry.content:
Hello Jordan,

Thank you for your engagement in the SAP Signavio Community!

Unfortunately, we’re unable to provide a suitable solution via this channel. We kindly recommend that you open a ticket via SAP for Me to get in direct contact with our SAP Signavio support team.

To do so, please log in to SAP for Me using your S-user and password, and create a ticket using the component BPI-SIG.

Best regards from Munich,
Veronika

entry.title: Re: Service broker destination-service-broker failed
entry.content:
Hello All,

Kindly go through below post:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/service-broker-error-service-broker-destination-service-broker-failed-with/qaq-p/14057439#M4909360

Regards,

Mahendra Saini

entry.title: Alumni Experience- 1H2025 Release
entry.content:
Alumni Experience Blog has been created together with @niharika and @anantapalli 

The Alumni Experience gives former employees access to their personal and payroll related information after their employment ends. 

In this Blog, we are going to cover on below to have smooth Alumni Experience:

A) Pre-Requisite.

B) Configurations Enablement. 

C)Demo + IAS Sync.

D)Alumni Offboarding Purge.

E) FAQ.

 

A)Pre-Requisite:

1.Enable Offboarding and ensure that the Employee Data Review Step is configured in your Offboarding process variant.

2.Identity Authentication Services (IAS)/IPS should be enabled.

3.Company logo and setting - Enable latest people profile.

4.Company logo and setting- Enable Show inactive user in people profile search.

5.ECP (Employee Central Payroll) should be enabled.

6.Personal Email Should be maintained in Employee profile.

B)Configurations Enablement:

Step1: Feature Enablement

Enable alumni switch from Admin Centre-Onboarding General setting page (it will appear only if offboarding switch is enabled)

Step 2: RBP Enablement 

Once feature is enabled from onboarding general setting page, "Alumni External User" role will be auto-created with user type as "Alumni"

List of Permissions available for RBP:

Assignment: Grant themselves so that alumni can access only their profile.

 

Step 3: Business Rules Enablement

Business Rule Scenarios (2 scenarios) will be auto created once alumni feature enabled:

A)Initiate Alumni Process -It will determine whether terminated employee (offboarded) will be Eligible as Alumni.

B)Set End Date for Alumni User Access: It will set an expiration date to end user's access to alumni experience.

Step 4: Provisioning Jobs Enablement

2 Jobs Need to be enabled :

A) Job Type-ONB2ConvertTerminatedEmployeeToAlumniJob : It will convert Terminate employee to Alumni Status.

Former employees are converted to alumni users on the day after their employment ends.

B)Job Type-ONB2AlumniProcessCloseJob- It will convert back user status from alumni - Terminated status.

When the defined Alumni Access time period is over and once the conversion job runs successfully, alumni user access to the alumni portal is terminated.

Step 5: Job Scheduler Enablement

Job Type-Sync Alumni Data -To ensure that changes to actions or business rules are incorporated into the existing Alumni process, configure the Alumni Maintenance Job.

You've scheduled a one-time maintenance job in the Schedule Job Manager. When triggered, the job updates the alumni process with any changes to actions or business rules. Once configured, this job can be manually triggered as- needed from the Job Scheduler page.

Step 6: Configure Alumni Activation Email Template in IAS

Go to SAP Cloud Identity Services-Identity Provisioning Target Systems (your Identity Authentication target system Transformations)-Switch to JSON Editor-Edit and add below piece of code to transformation xml:

Create a new property called ias.alumni.email.template.id.attribute. Go to SAP Cloud Identity Services Applications & Resources Email Template Sets (select the Email Template Set) On-Behalf Registration (tab) and copy the URL value in your browser right after Template Sets.

After the On-Behalf Registration email template set and new property value have been configured, specify that this email template set should be used for Alumni.
Go to SAP Cloud Identity Services Identity Provisioning Target Systems (your Identity Authentication target system)-Transformations-Switch to JSON Editor-Edit and add below piece of code to transformation xml:

 

C)DEMO+IAS Sync:

Step1: Terminating employee Suzhal M Shocks with end date as 24-feb-25.

Step 2: Employee Data Review Step should be completed and Alumni process will be triggered . 

In order to verify it : Please navigate to Admin centre-manage data - You will observe new object "AlumniProcess" will be created with process status as "Not Started".

Step 3: Start date of Alumni is 25-feb (which is post termination date ) .so if job now runs in provisioning it will convert terminated employee to Alumni status (ONB2ConvertTerminatedEmployeeToAlumni) .

ONB2ConvertTerminatedEmployeeToAlumni Job concept : It will pickup all the users whose process status is "Not started " for alumni process and startDate<=particular date where job ran.

It will update status from Not started to Enabled as shown in below screenshot :

Step4 : Alumni User Status is Active Now in SuccessFactors:

 

Step 5: IAS Sync for Suzhal M Shocks

User Staus is currently inactive in IAS side:

Real Time Sync will convert user status from Employee to Alumni with Delta Sync.

User Login Name will be converted to personal Email Address + User Type updated as Alumni from Employee + Status changed from Inactive to Active.

 

Alumni will receive an automated email to personal email address to login:

Alumni Login from Activation Email :

Initially Alumni Need to accept DPCS Statement

Once login ,please click on employee profile

Alumni can edit personal information:

 

Alumni can update payment information:

D)Alumni Offboarding Purge :

The Alumni Process couples with the Offboarding process, so the Offboarding purge needs to be configured to align with the expiration of alumni access.

The alumni process is a child process of the Offboarding process, however the alumni process can remain active after the Offboarding process is completed.

If the Offboarding purge is triggered while the alumni access is active, the Offboarding purge is skipped for the active alumni users. When enabling Alumni Access, you must update your Offboarding purge configuration, so it aligns with the Alumni Access period.

E)FAQ:

1.If Alumni update payment method and what if work flow configured?.
Answer: Yes workflow will be triggered to user to approve it.

2.Is offboardee and alumni user status are same ?
Answer: Alumni status will get changed only after termination date .

3.Alumni can access outstanding offboarding tasks (ex: KT Tasks)?
Answer: Based on permission provided for alumni role.It is upto alumni user would like to perform or not those outstanding tasks.

4.what is status type for alumni ?
Answer: Alumni shares the external user flag 'e'

5.how alumni will login after termination?
Answer: Personal Email address in mandate to be maintained in employee profile before termination date.

6.Where Alumni Email Templated will be configured?
Answer : It will be configured in IAS side . Kindly refer guide for more details in scetion :Configuring the Alumni Activation Email Template in Identity Authentication.

7.if we convert type to alumni via job(convert term employee to alumni) ,whether rehire will be triggered? because status should be f to trigger rehire.
Answer: Rehire is handled for Alumni.

8.Is it necessary for the alumni process creation job to be scheduled after the hris sync job? Also does this job take care of timezone of the user?
Answer: As for the process closure, Alumni process in itself is independent with very less coupling to offboarding. Having it separate and creating this job is one time activity for the customer.

9.Whether Alumni Access can be revoked by Manager from Dashboard?
Answer:Yes ,it can be revoked by manager from offboarding dashboard. Please find below screenshot.

10.How Alumni Access Date is set in Offboarding Dashboard?
Answer:It will be set based on rule :Set End Date for Alumni User Access

 

Alumni Experience for rehires (Rehire with Old Employment and Rehire with New Employment) to be continued in separate Blog .

Happy Learnings 🙂

Thanks,
Gopinath Murugaiyan
IT Technology Senior Consultant.
Workforce Solutions | Corporate Functions & Analytics.
SAP Labs India Private Limited | Whitefield | Bangalore- 560066, India.

entry.title: Re: How to enhance a customize DDIC checks for code inspect
entry.content: Hello, I want to create a custom DDIC object naming check, is it possible to share your code? Thank you.

entry.title: Water balance and usage report - Test Guide
entry.content:
Story flow Summary

Prerequisites

This section summarizes all the prerequisites for conducting the test in terms of systems, users, master data, organizational data, other test data, and business conditions. Before you begin the testing procedures, make sure that you complete the steps in the referenced document.

 

System Access

 

System

Details

System

  1. Accessible via SAP Fiori launchpad. Your system administrator provides you with the URL to access the various apps assigned to your role.

 

Required Fiori Apps

Roles

Create business roles using the following SAP business role templates and assign them to your test users. 

Alternatively, if available, you can use the following spaces delivered by SAP. You create a space with pages containing predefined essential apps and assign it to the business role. You then assign this business role to your users. 

For more information, refer to How to Create a Business Role from a Template in the product assistance for SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

 

Overview Table

This guide consists of several steps, which are provided in the table below.

 

Test Procedures

This section describes test procedures for each process step in this scope item.

Environmental Technician

Data Collection:

  1. Log on to the SAP Fiori launchpad as an Environmental Technician role

  2. Choose My Data Collection App.

  3. You can get an overview of all data collections assigned to you.

  4. Data Collection by using Manual Entry

    - Select a data collection from the list to enter the data.

  5. Data Collection by importing a file - 

    • You can import environmental Data into multiple data collection definitions using a predefined template file.

    • Choose the Import Data option, and a window will pop up to import the file.

    • Click on Download Template File for import option, A Standard template (.XLSL) file will download to your Desktop. 

     

    • Fill in the Data in the template as per the instructions in the file.

    • Save the template.

    • Click on Import Data, choose the Browse option, select the File name from your local Desktop, and import it.

    • If the imported data is correct, an imported message will appear on the screen.


    • If the imported data is incorrect, the system will throw errors. Attached some errors for reference (Ex-Date format is not valid).

     


    • Note: The Standard Data Import template contains two sheets (ENV_AMOUNT_MDEF and Table Field Descriptions). The user should enter the data only in the ENV_AMOUNT_MDEF sheet. If the user tries to fill in the data in the Table Field Descriptions sheet and import it into the system, the system will throw the error "File does not contain any records for import."

  6. Data Collection by using Manual Entry: 

    • Choose Edit and enter data values and a comment for pending records.
    • Choose Save. Your entries are saved in the system.

    Note: Repeat the above step to complete all the data collections.

The following are Data collections used in the Water Balance & Usage model

  • Purchased Water (m3)
  • Well Water (m3)
  • Rainfall(mm)
  • Wastewater after treatment to outside facility (m3)
  • Wastewater after treatment to surface water (m3)
  • Stormwater Runoff (m3)
  • Evaporation (m3)
  • Water in-Product (m3)
  • Water to Irrigation-Ground (m3)

 

 

Environmental Manager

Monitor Data

Procedure:

  1. Log on to the SAP Fiori launchpad as an Environmental Manager role.

  2. Choose Monitor Data App. By using Monitor Data App, you can access environmental data records for a specific data collection, calculation, aggregation, or sampling activity.

  3. Once the Monitor Data - Environment Management app opens, the system displays the recently opened monitor data.        

  4. Choose Display by Location and select the Location from Location Structure. Location-related data will be displayed on the screen.

     

    Click on the title to which you want to see the graphic representation of Collected data, Calculated data, or aggregated data.

  5. Once you click on the Title option, it will navigate to the Monitor data screen, where you can see the data in both graphical representation and Table view. 

     

    The following are the options you can find in the Monitor data collection screen.

    • Approve: You can accept the value (collected or calculated) and provide a short description in the Comment field to explain your decision.
    • Replace: You can replace an incorrect or missing value and provide a short description in the Comment field to explain your decision.
    • Invalidate: If you consider a data record's value incorrect and do not want to use it further, you can invalidate it.
    • Create Deviation Incident: You can create a deviation incident for a selected data record (collected or calculated data) and investigate its reason as part of another process.
    • Export Data: You can export the collected, calculated, and Aggregated data into the spreadsheets.
    • Import Data: Import the collected, calculated, and aggregate data into the spreadsheets.

 

Environmental Data Explorer

  1. Choose the Environmental Data Explorer App        

  2. Environmental Data Explorer app helps you to monitor the environmental data (collected, calculated, sampled, or aggregated) at a given location.

    By default, the app loads and displays environmental data for the location (and its subordinate locations) that is set as My Location.

    Choose a location that has environmental data that you want to display

    Under the Filter section, select or deselect the criteria that you wish. The app automatically loads and displays the existing data records.

  3. You can filter data by the following attributes:

    • Issue Type: Displays results of system checks against environmental limits, and data by availability.
    • Data Status: Displays data based on its applicability and validity.
    • Year: Displays environmental data every year.
    • Month: Displays environmental data every year.
    • Day: Displays environmental data every year.
    • Data Type: Displays data by compliance scenario activity type that specifies how it was recorded in the system.
    • Activity Name: Displays the name of the compliance scenario activity.
    • Subject: Displays data by the subject of the data records in the system.
    • Activity Name: Displays the name of the compliance scenario activity.
    • Data Title: Displays data by the names of the data records in the system.
    • Location: Displays all data by location.
    • Preliminary Result: Displays data records based on preliminary results of calculations and aggregations.
    • External Source: Displays data records imported via automatic data collection from another system.      

Query Browser

  • Choose Custom Analytical Queries App                                        

     

  • In the Custom Analytical Queries App,
    • Click the “Create” button to create a custom analytical query with an appropriate Query name.
    • Select a Data Source: Choose the appropriate data source, such as the Cube CDS View - I_EHSAmountsCube. 

  •  In the General Tab: Provide an appropriate label name.

  • In the Field Selection Tab, identify and select the necessary fields for your analysis(using the Check box). The required fields are Year, Current Date, Language Key, Main Location ID, Activity ID, Activity Name, Status, Date, Year and Month, and Amount Value( Optionally, add further fields for a more comprehensive analysis).
  • In the Display tab: Optionally, Override Labels with appropriate names.
    Adjust Field Settings: Review and adjust the settings for each field as needed.
  • In the Filters tab: Optionally, set fixed or user-defined filters.
    Fixed Values: Language Key = EN, Status = 02.
    User-defined: Mandatory* (Current Date, Main Location ID, Activity ID), Year, Year and Month
  • Save Draft: Save your work as a draft.
    Preview Results (Optional): preview the results to ensure accuracy.
    Publish: Finalize and publish your analysis.                                          

  • Open Query Browser App: Launch the Query Browser application.

    Search for Published Analytical View: Locate the desired analytical view that has been published.
    Open for Analysis: Click "Open for Analysis" to begin your analysis.          

  • Enter Required Parameters: In the Analytics screen, input the necessary parameters such as Current Date, Location ID, Activity ID, and Year. Then, click on "Go".

    Fetch and Display Data: The query will retrieve and display the data in graphical charts.

  • Change Chart Type (Optional): Use the Chart Settings option located on the right side of the chart to change the chart type as needed.

  • Save Analytics (Optional): Use the options available in the top-right corner of the screen to:

     - Save the analytics as a tile.
     - Send an email.
     - Copy the URL.

entry.title: Do you know the impact YOU are having on SAP’s AI roadmap?
entry.content:
SAP is delivering AI use cases with each release – and maybe you’re wondering about how we’re prioritizing the cases we deliver.

An extremely critical input to SAP’s AI roadmap is YOU - and how you’re using SAP Cloud ERP software today.

SAP Cloud ERP customers have the chance to provide feedback in several ways:

1) New ideas for improvements can be made via the Customer Influence Portal
2) Service requests and usage information is available in SAP for me
3) Joining an industry-specific customer advisory board or influence council

SAP Finance engineering closely monitors these channels. But in addition to evaluating which requests will be added as new features on the roadmap, we’re also constantly analyzing how you are using SAP’s core finance processes – from record-to-report to finance operations – to find use cases where SAP Business AI can make your system faster-to-adopt and easier-to-use.

I’d like to highlight 2 specific generally-available AI use cases that originated from this kind of usage analysis:

  • US Tax Configuration

Configuring US sales and use taxes can be difficult for any accountant; there is a lot of complexity with 50 states and lower-level jurisdictions taking different approaches. SAP Engineering saw this as a great use case for providing pro-active guidance to set the system up correctly.

SAP Cloud ERP now uses an SAP Business AI-supported approach to walk accountants through the configuration process, smoothing onboarding for companies doing business in the US. The system uses an interactive approach to give the accountant a co-pilot that detects and generates proposals for the correct compliance configurations.

The accountant enters a US zip code, and the sales and use tax rates are proposed. A direct link to the state tax authority website provides additional confidence in the proposals – users can verify the source with a single click.

  • Depreciation key explanations

As companies extend their Cloud ERP usage to additional countries, they must update the settings for country-specific accounting treatments for fixed asset depreciation. This can be a challenge – specifying the right keys during implementation is critical to making sure the downstream calculations are accurate. And the process of doing the research and then making the correct settings can take hours.

By using SAP Business AI to explain the depreciation key setup, companies are seeing a 90% reduction in effort related to research and analysis on the deprecation configurations. New accountants can be onboarded faster, and Cloud ERP rollouts to additional countries can stay on-track.

What's next?

With each release of Cloud ERP, SAP is delivering new functional capabilities with SAP Business AI, as well as new analytics cases. But we are also constantly exploring how system usage analysis can help us deliver AI-supported capabilities that will protect your project timelines and deliver on our promise of an AI-enhanced user experience. 

One area that’s in the focus of process analysis today is accruals automation. SAP can observe posting patterns – and define AI-approaches that will add automation in future releases. Here we see huge potential in agentic approaches that proactively monitor business situations and tigger complex postings, increasing automation and reducing error rates. But more to come on “agentic in Finance” in a future blog.

You can always see our plans in the SAP Roadmap.

Want to learn about what’s available today? Explore the Discovery Center!

And here’s a “Pro Tip”: filter for the Product “#SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition”.

entry.title: Re: Deletion of CI_COBL
entry.content: 1. SAP allows you deleting CI_COBL. 2. SE14 should work. As you got into the inconsistent state, you may repair it as explained in the forum (user DDIC client 000) but BE CAREFUL with SE14 you may lose the data in your tables, you need to be very careful now. First ask the users to stop using the system during the repair due to the high risk (otherwise you need to restore the database, it may take hours).

entry.title: Re: Update/Modify any Table data dynamically
entry.content: It's not a question. Moderator alerted, you should publish this document in Blogs.

entry.title: Re: what is the default role and grouping considered duri...
entry.content: Hello,

entry.title: Create a custom code inspector check for DDIC object naming?
entry.content:
Hello, I want to create a Code Inspector check, to check the names of custom DDIC objects created, to respect the naming conventions given by my client (e.g. data elements should be named ZE_*, structures should be name ZS_*, etc.)

Did anyone create such a custom code, and could share the code please?

Sandra

NB: it's almost the same question as Re: How to enhance a customize DDIC checks for cod... - SAP Community, except that the guy was reporting a problem to develop this custom Code Inspector check, and did not share the code.

entry.title: Introduction to SAP DRC and Integration aspects
entry.content:
SAP Document and Reporting Compliance (SAP DRC) enables the organization to create, process, and monitor electronic documents and statutory reports. As a result, the company stays compliant with local legal obligations.

In this blog I will refer this as DRC or SAP DRC

Core Features of SAP DRC are

  1. E-Invoices for Sales
  2. Incoming Invoices
  3. Transport Registrations
  4. Legal/Statutory reporting based on country requirements

                 

Core features (in detail)

  • SAP DRC is offered on premise and on cloud and the integration with the tax authorities is standard content delivered by SAP.
  • Transport Registration is mandatory in some countries like Portugal, Romania etc so this feature is supported for relevant countires
  • Tax reporting is supported for most of the countries (NOT ALL) so ensure you check this link before assuming – SAP HELP
  • SAP DRC on Cloud license is based on volumes of invoices per month along with the countries in scope for an organization. Details can only be validated with SAP account manager.

Solution brief

Now we will discuss the process flow for both outgoing and incoming invoices

Outgoing (Sales) invoice Processing

E-Doc Cockpit view (Transaction EDOC_COCKPIT)

XML view

Transport Order generation

Incoming (purchase) invoice Processing

Statutory/Legal Reporting

Country specific reports can be generated from SAP DRC. These can be

  • VAT reports
  • SAF-T reports
  • EC Sales list
  • Many more based on country requirements

Process flow

Relevant Fiori apps

Is it on Premise or on cloud?

  1. In the business systems to make compliance a seamless step within the business processes, with no data redundancy and no data replication. This is On-Premises
  1. On SAP Business Technology Platform to connect to govt authorities and platforms. This can be SAP DRC Cloud.

For more detailed insights on SAP Document and Reporting Compliance (DRC) and the cloud edition, below links can be referred

  • SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, cloud edition – Online Help Documentation
  • SAP Document and Reporting Compliance for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition and SAP S/4HANA – Onlin...
  • SAP Document and Reporting Compliance for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition – Online Help Documentat...
  • SAP Document and Reporting Compliance for SAP ERP
  • Overview video: Integration with Peppol network with SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, cloud ed...
  • Overview video: How can SAP Document and Reporting Compliance support you in meeting the new KSeF re...
  • Overview video: Exchange invoices over the Peppol network using the Cloud Edition and Concur Invoice
  • Overview video: Discover the New eOrdering Process of SAP Document and Reporting Compliance

I will share more details around country specifics in my next blog, till then enjoy reading and share your experience in comments

(some images are taken from other SAP content and the copyright remains with the owner)

entry.title: Schedule Update of Down Payment Status - Sales Orders
entry.content:
Hello,

I was looking for a program/app/tcode in S/4HANA OP which represents the Public Cloud app "F5781: Schedule Update of Down Payment Status - Sales Orders".

Unfortunately I didn't find anything in the SAP documentation. Maybe somebody can point me in the right direction.

High level desired process:

  1. SD order with billing plan (down payment request FAZ)
  2. Integrate the down payment request in FICA
  3. Process incoming payments in FICA
  4. Update sales order status when down payment has been received (so we can remove the delivery/billing block).

Thanks in advance.

Best Regards,
Henk Hoogerbrug

entry.title: API Provider - Authentication type - Only two options
entry.content:
Hello,

when creating a new API Provider I have only the choice to select a "None" or "Basic" Authentication type.

Why there are only those two options?

However, in the SAP BTP - Connectivity - Destination Area I have the choise of much more Authentication options.

Why is there a diffrence?

I need to setup a Connection to a Webservice with a Access (JWT) Token with the OAuth2 and client credentials flow.

Do I need to add this in the Policies of the corresponding API-Proxy ?

Best regards

Jerome

entry.title: Do you know the impact YOU are having on SAP's AI roadmap for Finance
entry.content:
SAP is delivering AI use cases with each release – and maybe you’re wondering about how we’re prioritizing the cases we deliver.

 

An extremely critical input to SAP’s AI roadmap is YOU - and how you’re using SAP software today.

This blog in the ERP community might be interesting for you!

entry.title: Assignment profile LMS - prevent a training already listed in to do from being reassigned
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

When setting up an assignment profile in SuccessFactors Learning, how can we prevent a training already listed in the employee's to-do list (learning needs) from being reassigned to avoid duplicates ?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: JDBC Receiver: 'com.microsoft.sqlserver.jdbc.SQLServe...
entry.content:
Hi Sakshi_T - Well, you did correct! After increasing the connection time if you still encounter the same error! This notifies to check the payload!

  1. Identify on which record the issue persist
  2. Remove that record (for testing)
  3. Retry with other records

Regards,

Karthik Arjun

SAP BTP and Integration Architect

entry.title: Re: How to copy data from parent node to child node via d...
entry.content: Thank you for replying @N1kh1l. You are correct , I have created an alternate hierarchy where H1 is a leaf member. I can use the cross model step but don't you think that this approach would be a static approach as I'm hard coding the mapping rule. I want the data to be copied from node level to child level based on the flag defined in the master data.

entry.title: Re: Pricing Condition Record numbers
entry.content: TC: SNRO - Range 'KONH' - Interval '01'

entry.title: Where can I download the Integration Solution Add On?
entry.content:
From what I have read, it seems like IntegrationSolutionsAddon.ard is one of the add-on to be installed if I want to use the integration solution, but I am not able to find the installer in the sap portal or the standard SAP installer.

if there is anyone who knows where I can get the IntegrationSolutionsAddon.ard, can you be kind enough to give me steps to reach the installer in the SAP portal?

 

Note: I have tried install the following, but none of it gave me any ARD file to install.

1. "Integration Solution Component" from the SAP v10 FP 2408 SQL version installer

2. "Integration Framework For SME" which I downloaded from the SAP Launchpad

 

Many thanks in advance, 

Best Regards,

 

Wielyanto

entry.title: Re: Missing left menu options in Integration Suite.
entry.content:
Hi AndrewKelly - The left menu is not missing from the Integration Suite, it has hidden behind the developer roles. 

Go to BTP cockpit -> Under Security Roles -> Assign Integration Developer (PI Admin, and all related PI roles) to your user id. 

After assigning the roles -> Close the browser -> clear the cache -> log-in again

Refer: SAP BTP Trial Account Creation and Enabling Integr... - SAP Community -> Point number 19 and 20

Regards,

Karthik Arjun

SAP BTP | Integration Suite Architect

entry.title: Re: Automatically add account in involved parties to lead...
entry.content:
The involved party determination logic at the Leads for Account field = Contact of Account means that when creating a new Lead, if you select a value in the Contact field of an empty Lead document, the Account field will be automatically populated with the main Account associated with that Contact.

However, your request does not clearly specify the exact requirement you are trying to achieve. Could you clarify whether you expect the Account to be automatically added to the Involved Parties without selecting a Contact, or if you are looking for a different type of determination logic?

entry.title: Re: Message mapping: disabled fields still show in target message
entry.content: Hi Robert - Would be better to share the screenshots, please?

entry.title: Re: READ method not executing in RAP Web API V4
entry.content:
@DDEBORSHI 

From my experience, the READ method is called when READ ENTITY EML is executed. For HTTP GET requests, data is read from the underlying CDS view.

entry.title: IRPA Set Element value in UI5 is not saved
entry.content:
Hi, I have an issue in my automation - I am uploading invoices to Fiori portal, screen is as follows:

By clicking upload in the upper part, it adds document. After or before that user is able to add note. When this is all done by user and finally clicked in below right corner to Save invoice, both invoice and note are saved. When I am doing this within automation, for some reason value of this element is set correctly but is not saved and this value stays in that field even when the invoice is acutally uploaded. I have tried many options like wait element, wait change element, wait for some seconds and so on. Nothing has helped. Do you have any idea what am I doing wrong? There is windows "Save as" dialog in between but I dont think it plays any role as I tried to add note before its open and after its open without any luck. Many thanks for your suggestions.

@Chaitanya_Priya can you help on this? Thank you.

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration suite - OData v2 adapter - error java.lang.NullPointerException
entry.content: Hi MinhTriLe - Can you copy paste the error message from trace mode? Enable attach error checkbox in the adapter and provide the details here, please

entry.title: Re: READ method not executing in RAP Web API V4
entry.content:
Hi,

In the handler class, hope it is explicitly maintained (the read operation), I mean something like below: -

CLASS zcl_my_handler IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD read_entity.
    DATA: lt_data TYPE TABLE OF zmy_entity.

    TRY.
        SELECT * FROM zmy_entity
          INTO TABLE lt_data
          WHERE key_field = @Keys-key_field.  " Use your key field

        IF lt_data IS INITIAL.
          RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE /iwbep/cx_mgw_busi_exception
            EXPORTING textid = /iwbep/cx_mgw_busi_exception=>business_error
                      message = 'Record not found!'.
        ENDIF.

        result = lt_data.  " Return the result

      CATCH cx_sy_open_sql_db INTO DATA(lx_sql).
        RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE /iwbep/cx_mgw_tech_exception
          EXPORTING message = lx_sql->get_text( ).

    ENDTRY.

  ENDMETHOD.

ENDCLASS.

and once this is there, can be please put a BP in this and see?

Thanks,

Arun

entry.title: Deleted SLP contact
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

During vendor onboard, the contact from SLP has been deleted after he filled the registration questionnaire.

I see him at the Admin site(succesfully registrated, approved, activated). When i try to add again to SLP contact: "This supplier already has a contact with the email address you entered." It gives this error msg. So i can't add to the contact list again and send him the qualification questionnaire.

Anyone has an idea how to add again to the contact list this deleted email adress? Thank you

Thanks for your reply.

I have doubt here, when I am doing POST and DELETE operation from URL then I see CREATE and DELETE methods are triggering. So only for GET it taking from CDS. Is it?

Thanks

entry.title: Rounding profile: by using the grid the functionality seems not working
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

 

using di Rounding profile on products we have an issue and the system seems not working. The system is I-RS and so inserting the generic article and quantity the system displays the characteristics grid (size and color) and we can insert the quantities to be exploded in the Variant articles. After the setup of rounding profile, if we insert directly the variant article in the sales order, the system works correctly and apply the rounding but by using the grid the system doesn’t do anything and the functionality seems not working at all even after the explosion of all variants.

entry.title: Re: How to copy data from parent node to child node via d...
entry.content:
Mapping rule can be defined based on attributes also.

 

Even the Advanced Formula will work. Make sure you define in CONFIG statement for hierarchy for profit center to be set as Alternate hierarchy. Also the alternate hierarchy should also have the leaf members A,B,C,D either as root or defined as a leaf. If define as root, Include CONFIG to include members not in hierarchy in AF. Also set your hierarchy setting in dimensions to group orphan under not in hierarchy.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: SFTP using Rise with SAP( no PI )
entry.content:
James,

Thank you for your response, it’s really helpful.

Based on your information, we plan to apply these steps for our client;

https://aws.amazon.com/tr/blogs/awsforsap/secure-file-transfer-with-the-aws-sdk-for-sap-abap/

However, since I don’t have AWS access, we’ve reached out to the client about this.

Do you think we are on the right track? Also, if you have any resources to share, it would be much appreciated.

aatan

entry.title: DMEEX structure supporting excel file S4 Hana

Hello,

 

Anybody has DMEE structure supporting excel file where we can check table field mapping to DMEE structure (FPAYH-FPAYHX-FPAYP) for S4 Hana?

entry.title: Re: Build Apps POST call - HTTP 403 Error (Invalid CSRF Token)

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP: Understanding of Actions and Functions (Part 1)

Hello,
Will you prepare part 2 of this blog? Exposing backend function imports with parameters in CAP is what I am struggling at the moment and I think you could help a lot.

entry.title: Re: How to stop Source HU proposal during Allocation Ware...
entry.content:
Hi prasan_desi,

Sorry this is the standard behaviour of Sock distribution to Outbound ( Actual Picking to Outbound Delivery) thats why you used 2 step Process, however there is another option to optimize. What is your version ?

1 > Use Optimizer settings - HU will be intermidieate location where allocation stock to Outbound so business has less option. Move rest picked HU from withdraw to Staging/repacking...I totally agree you and business, it would very difficult to find the right HU where they would break so addition of this process would help business. Addition to this, you can divide bin location to sub division means Make it multiple bins in stead of 1 and keep 1 or 2 HUs max  per sub divided bin for better visibility. It definitely improve process,I know this need to work closely with business. In this case business does not need much search of HU...

 

2 > Other option is enhancement in RF if business is not agreed in option 1. 

Missed 1 point: ( added later ) Also create auto WT  for allocation( Ignore if already you used 😞

Please let us know if any questions...

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: CVI Customizing Check for Synchronization
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have a query on CVI Check. 

1.For BP-Customer Check, this error appears as "BP -> customer: customer roles exist but numbers have not been assigned" and "Roles assigned; direction "BP -> customer" not activated". How do i correct these errors?

2. Legal Form assignment is inconsistent

Your advise is much apreciated. Thank you!

entry.title: Issue in Inventory Counting Screen SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear team,

We are currently facing an issue in the inventory counting screen for a few items. As of now, I am sharing an example of one item for your reference:

  • Item Code: 10015
  • Inventory Counting Screen shows: 8856.2500 qty
  • Inventory Audit Report shows: 28956.25 qty
  • Inventory Counting Screen Count date and inventory audit report date : 31/03/2025

Please do the needful on it.

 

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Work Zone search results: content pages that also appear in custom nav appear twice
entry.content:
In my WZ site I have a workpage that also appears in the custom nav.

When I search for this page it appears in results twice - see attached. 

One result is listed as a "Workpage", which when clicked presents the page in it's workpage view, without the navigation I've built. I don't want this search result to display. In general I don't ever want to expose my users to the content directory or content view. This is not how web pages behave. 

The other, confusingly, is listed as "Workspace tabs", which displays the page with the page navigation. I DO want this result to appear. 

How can I control search results to prevent this pointless and distracting duplication?

Why does this even happen?

How can I deploy the Build Apps project to the C4C system to make it available to end users?

Kind regards,

Srimathy Raja

entry.title: Re: ZUGFeRD import to SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi Roland,

I guess the file attached to the note is created with the last version of EFM. Try upgrade your B1 to version 10 FP2502.

Kind regards,

Ganna Hrivnakova

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Thanks a lot, Fl0r1n and stephan_daub.

Probably Hardware key is not an issue. But I have trouble with passwords. Maybe I lost this valuable info.

I can not run Slicence and check because I don't have SAP* password. I have only DEVELOPER psw - Ldtf5432 (from trial 1909 - it may be wrong psw)

In instruction said - 

  1. Logon to your ABAP system with the user SAP*, client 000, same password as for DEVELOPER (DEVELOPER , client 001, is locked)."

Probably I missed somewhere correct password. I guess  someone can tell me a correct passwords.

With running Slience I just can upload correct licence As I did always earlier. And no need to run  

docker cp A4H.txt a4h:/opt/sap/ASABAP_license​

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Quick way of finding successor / released objects in S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Quick steps to finding out the released / successor Objects in S/4 HANA 

1. Using SAP's Cloudification Repository Viewer github link

https://sap.github.io/abap-atc-cr-cv-s4hc/?version=objectReleaseInfo_PCE2023_1.json&q=mara

refer detailed blog by- @aoyang 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/s-4-hana-cloudification-guide-for-developer-navigating-to-released-apis/ba-p/13950875

2. Alternate way to finding successor object is using backend table view ARS_W_API_SCCSSR : API Successor Data of Deprecated/Decommissioned APIs where SubObjectName is the search Object. User should have access to backend S/4 HANA system. This table stores only deprecated api's also refer other supporting table ARS_W_API_STATE for release state info.

entry.title: Re: Create a custom code inspector check for DDIC object naming?
entry.content:
Does not answer your question but might be interesting to follow:
Precheck Naming Convention for ABAP/FIORI Development artifacts during creation https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/340794/?section=sectionDetails

entry.title: How prevent Work Zone opening external links in a new tab
entry.content:
Work Zone always opens external links in a new tab. I don't want this, I want to keep users in one tab and preserve the unitary browsing experience, where the back button continues to behave as expected. 

How can I prevent external links opening in a new tab?

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Welcome Samin !

entry.title: Issue ITS upload files
entry.content:
Hi, I have a problem with ITS.
I created a program that at a certain moment calls the method  cl_gui_frontend_services=>gui_upload.

Then I created with se80 the service internet with the html template to connect it with this program and at the end I created through SICF the service related.

When I launch the service on the web and the program has to call the upload a screen appears with these sentences:

"Wait: automatic transfer

Page inserted for technical reasons"

entry.title: Automatic Transfer to New Manager P&G Forms
entry.content:
Hello All,

We want the Performance Forms to transfer automatically to the new manager on the current step of the Route Map.

All the Automatic Manager Transfer options are enabled in Forms Settings

In Automatic Manager Transfer the below options are enabled:

1) Automatic En Route Document Transfer To New Manager

2) Automatic Inbox Document Transfer To New Manager

3) Automatic insertion of new manager as next document recipient if not already

However, the current step remains on the "old" manager and only the future steps are updated.

Below the error in the Check Tool:

"No document transfer job requests are blocked due to an RBP refresh failure. (PMFormDTCECheck)"

Please note that when tested on January the functionality worked smoothly.

Does anyone have any ideas what is blocking the transfer in the current step?

Thanks,

Konstantina

entry.title: Re: Translation is not working on a "My inbox" custom tile.
entry.content:
Hello,

I assume that a translation from SAP is missing, e.g. SAP Note 2724588.
Create an incident and request the translation from SAP.

Regards,
Patrick

entry.title: How can I deploy my completed SAP Build Apps web application to the SAP C4C System?
entry.content:
I have created a web application in SAP Build Apps using the SAP C4C system OData. Now it is completed.
How can I deploy the Build Apps project to the C4C system to make it available to end users? SAP Build Apps 

 

BR Srimathy

entry.title: Work Zone UI integration card: lose the Success Factors navbar?
entry.content:
I'm surfacing some data from Success Factors in my Work Zone site using UI integration cards. 

When I do this the card shows the data I want, but also the SF navigation bar at the top of the card - see attached, red box.  I've seen usability tests where users disappear into SF in the UI card window, fiddling about with the SF nav bar whilst trying to complete a task completely unrelated. It confuses and distracts them and I don't want to display it. 

How can I call the SF view into WZ without the SF navbar?

entry.title: Re: READ method not executing in RAP Web API V4
entry.content:
Hi DDEBORSHI,

May be the framework is bypassing the READ method. Just can you include use read;  also in behaviour to force trigger read logic?

Also please ensure cache cleanups (/IWFND/CACHE_CLEANUP
/IWBEP/CACHE_CLEANUP) and Restart the Service (/IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE) as usual to get the changes reflected.

Thanks,

Arun

entry.title: Re: USE OF AI IN ECLIPSE
entry.content:
Hello,

the planned release for ABAP Cloud Generator: Transactional App from Scratch is 2505 ( next month )

https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cross-product/roadmap-info/genai?q=Generators

Regards,
Patrick

entry.title: Re: Modernizing SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll
entry.content:
Thanks for the summary.

You mention improvements in PCC exclusive to the S/4 stack.
What are the actual improvements and when are they coming into the ECPs that are on S/4 stack already?

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, public sector Trial System
entry.content: One of the biggest problems in the public sector is the processing of expedient. Third-party developments such as GEXAP, IG4S, or SAP's RMS have historically solved this process through adjustments. Does the public sector solution for GROW have anything specific for this process?

entry.title: Re: Delete Business Partner in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud is not possible
entry.content: Hi - I would recommend to create a support ticket - they would be able to check the system and any remaining relationships for the BP. Or check the CDS View for BP Relationship. Is it possible they have an employee record? do they have any transactions associated that you have not archived? postings, etc. Thank you Jerry

entry.title: Re: Results Confirmation- Control indicators in MIC
entry.content: If the MICs are assigned to two different operations, will the After Acceptance Control indicator still work?

entry.title: Join Us for the SAP Signavio April 2025 Release Preview!
entry.content:
Explore the new and powerful features in the April 2025 SAP Signavio Process Transformation Suite release. This webcast will spotlight the latest innovations, including holistic value analysis capabilities, an expanding ecosystem enabled by enhanced connectivity, and improved analytical functionalities.

Release Highlights:

- Democratize Process Intelligence and reduce time to insights: Discover how our holistic value analysis capabilities enable end-to-end improvements
- Drive domain-specific value and outcomes: Explore new domain- and persona-specific accelerators designed to deliver enterprise-grade advancements
- Conversational copilots: Learn how next-gen Joule Skills supercharge process recommendations

Get an early look at all new features, updates, and enhancements of the SAP Signavio Process Transformation Suite! Join us on Thursday, April 24, 2025, at 4:00 p.m. CET / 10:00 a.m. EST for an exclusive preview of what's to be announced in our market release on April 29, 2025.


Register today and join us for this exciting event!

entry.title: Re: Onboarding New Hires Authentication using SAP Identity Authentication Service (IAS)
entry.content:
Hi @Gopinath,

 

Could you please explain how it works after the Onboardee hire process is complete?

 

Will the Employee Type change from "Onboardee" to "Employee" in IAS automatically on their First day? 

 

Another question I have is, if we have a IAS tenant integrated with SF before 2022, do we have to upgrade to SCIM IPS Connector as of now? Despite the recommendation, is it mandatory? Or only if we want to integrate Onboardees with IAS?

 

Thank you in advance!

 

Best Regards,

Mafalda

entry.title: Re: JDBC Receiver: 'com.microsoft.sqlserver.jdbc.SQLServe...
entry.content: Hi, Thank you for your suggestion. I just wanted to ask—could this issue be related to the Cloud Connector or the Database? Based on my observations, the issue doesn’t seem to be related to a specific record. For example, one day we processed 101 jobs/messages from ECC, and 22 failed. On another day, with the same data, 85 jobs failed with the error "Connection reset." Since the failures are inconsistent, I believe the issue might not be data-related. Please share your thoughts on this.

entry.title: Re: 🧰👷‍♂️ The SAP S/4HANA RISE & SAP BTP - Toolbox 👷‍♂️🧰
entry.content:

Introduction to SAP Master Data Governance   this is a 2025 document

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Federated governance with SAP Master Data Governance on SAP S/4HANA as core data owner

 

 

Solution Reference Architecture MDG

Central Governance of Business Partner Data (Classic Mode)

entry.title: SAC Automatic Datalocks workflows
entry.content:
Hello, 

i'm trying to make a dat alock run automatically but is still asking for permission but I don't know what we are doing wrong. 

The person that is owner of the data lock task is also assignee and is the owner of the locks inside of the model but the task is asking for permission to run. Why is this sitll happening? Here are some pictures: 

Datalock cancel because it haven't been approved 

Owner of the datalock in the dimension geography and in the dimmension audit trail. "Diego Moratilla"

Owner and asignee of the task.

Thank you so much for your help

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Dear @yury_sichov 

all passwords are listed in section "User and Passwords" in the docker README.md located here: https://hub.docker.com/r/sapse/abap-cloud-developer-trial 

Have a nice day!

Best,
Stephan
SAP - ABAP Cloud Developer Trial Team

entry.title: SAP S4 HANA GROUP REPORTING BEST PRACTIcES
entry.content:
I am new to SAP Group reporting , i want to explore the content of GR Best practices 

i found the below in the learning journey but i can't find the active links , thanks

entry.title: SAP PaPM Cloud Standard Model – Cron expression for Process Scheduler
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community!

This blogpost for the SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud – Standard Model (SAP PaPM Cloud SM) will introduce the enhancement of our Process Scheduler. As you have read in the last blogpost of 2024 Recurring Process and Multi-Selection of Activities in Process Scheduler, we have introduced the improvements of the Process Scheduler with regards to scheduling a job in recurring scenarios and being able to select multiple activities.

We are happy to announce the latest improvements in the Process Scheduler which we are adding the cron format of scheduling a job to accommodate our customers' needs . To support this feature, we have added a new field called Schedule Type, where users can select between One Time, Repeat Interval and Cron type for job scheduling. Let’s take a look at these different schedule types below:

One Time
This schedule type is basically almost the original state of the Process Scheduler when it was initially introduced in this blogpost Process Scheduler: Execution made easy by Scheduling a “Job” in SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud which allows the user to configure a one-time job. Moreover, you are now capable of selecting multiple activities inside the process template/process instance that will run sequentially as introduced in the recent enhancement. Here’s how to create a job using One Time schedule type.

After maintaining the fields and choosing CONFIRM button, the created job will be visible in the job list panel with “Scheduled” state.

Once the planned launch date and time is reached, the state of the job will be in “Completed” status while the Run Status and the Result in the job details panel will be populated.

Repeat Interval
This schedule type was the enhancement we have mentioned in this blogpost Recurring Process and Multi-Selection of Activities in Process Scheduler - we can schedule a job in recurring scenario using Human-Readable Date Formats. Here's what it looks like:

In this job example, we are scheduling a recurring job of every 5 minutes from 16:25 to 16:35 which will give us a total of 3 runs. After selecting the CONFIRM button, the job will be created with the "Scheduled" status and the "Repeat Interval" column will be populated with the schedule parameter we maintained in the "Add Process Schedule" dialogue. After the "Active Until" date and time was reached, the state of the job will be in "Completed" state and all the runs will be updated with run status and results. 

Spoiler
Note: If the "Active Until" field is not maintained, the job will run indefinitely or until the job has been deleted in the Process Scheduler screen.

Cron
This schedule type was introduced to accommodate scheduling of jobs recurrently in a more complex way. You may refer to this documentation to know more about using Cron Format.

The Cron schedule type will introduce the following new fields:

  1. XS Cron Expression - This is a free text field to which the users can input their cron expressions (In the example above, it means the job will run every hour at 12:00 to 09:00 UTC between Mondays to Fridays).
  2. Active Since - Specify the date and time when the scheduled job will start running. This field is not mandatory. If left blank, the first recurrence will be schedule at the earliest possible time after the job creation according to the maintained cron expression. 
  3. Active Until - Specify the date and time when the scheduled job will stop running. This field is also not mandatory. If left blank, the job will be running indefinitely, or until deleted.
Spoiler
IMPORTANT! Cron uses the Coordinated Universal Time (UTC). If you are to use Cron as schedule type, the time that you have to enter in the cron expression field should be in UTC. 

If you want to use Cron but do not know how to write one, we got you covered! You can use the "Generate Basic XS Cron Expression" picker beside the XS Cron Expression field . This option is introduced to help our beginner users to use this schedule type. Bear in mind that the picker cannot do all the combinations that technical users can produce manually. Since it is a free text field, after you have generated a cron expression using the picker, you can still edit the cron expression according to your requirements. You can pick from Daily, Weekly, Monthly and Yearly options. Let's talk about it one by one. 

Daily
If you choose Daily as frequency, it will run everyday at a given time. As shown below, I'm choosing to run the job daily at 08:00. 

Since my system time is in UTC+08:00, when I hit CONFIRM, the generated Cron expression will be scheduled at 12:00 UTC. 

Weekly
If you choose weekly as frequency, you can run a job in a specific time and day/days of the week. For my example below, I will run the job at 18:00 every Monday, Wednesday and Friday. Please see below:

The generated cron expression will look like this. 

Again, it does not look like I chose 18:00 as the maintained time but 10:00 since the cron generator will automatically convert the maintained system time to UTC time. 

Monthly
If we choose monthly as frequency, you can run a job in a specific time in specific day/days of the month. In my example below, I want to run a job at 18:00 every 1st, 10th, 15th, 20th and 30th day of the month. 

The generated cron expression will look like this:

Yearly
If you choose yearly as frequency, you can choose the specific time, months and days of the month accordingly. In my example below, I want to run my job on the 1st, 15th and 30th of January, June and December at 18:00. 

The generated cron will look like this:

After selecting the CONFIRM button, the state of the job will be in "Scheduled" state and the XS Cron Expression column header will show the maintained cron expression.

And there you have it. Like and share this blog post with your colleagues who may be interested in this new feature. This information is also available in our Application Help. 

Thank you!

entry.title: Reminder for Import Certificate
entry.content:
Hello All,

Due to the new tariffs imposed by the US on EU countries, every time a European sales organization creates a sales order for materials listed and where the recipient is a sales organization in the US, a pop-up (reminder) about attaching the import certificate should appear.

I have a list of approximately 500 materials for which, when creating a sales order with a recipient plant in the US, a message must appear indicating the necessity to attach the import certificate.

Do you have any suggestions which solution may I use for that?

Thank you in advance for your support.
BR

entry.title: Re: Is there a solution to prevent personal email on from...
entry.content:
Hi,

the Email in the Spotlight is the Email Address stored in Basic Info.

The Email address in Basic Info gets filled via HRIS Sync hardcoded with the Email address within the Contact Info for Email Address Type B (=Business). If the Personal Email stored in the Contact Info, that Email Address is not synchronized to the Basic Info and not shown in the spotlight. 

Please give more details where you see the personal email in the Spotlight.

 

BR,
Sandra

entry.title: Re: How to cancel Store order ID with Learning Hub subscr...
entry.content:
Hi @Manidipa 
Please follow-up the ticket. The assigned agent has updated it.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Delete Business Partner in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud i...
entry.content:
Hello Jerry,

thank you for your quick reply.

We do not think that created transactional data is a problem, as this was already queried and finalised by us when the work agreement was deleted. We were also able to delete business partners who had created postings in the system.

I try to find CDS View for BP Relationship but can not find for example I_BPRELATIONSHIP in our system. Can you name any other CDS View?

Best Regards

Tim

entry.title: Re: Depreciation area 01 does not manage values for revaluation
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: workflow for Purchase order value change
entry.content:
Hello,

we need to change the workflow for Purchase order change. The order value difference should be indicator of new release instead of the new order value in general.

The BAdi SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_DEF can be used to archive this. WF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_EVAL is the to-be-used BAdi-defintion.

I have been investigating how to add a new field in the BADI that covers the value changes in the PO, setting specific value from which the workflow is triggered.
It seems only those fields available in the CDS view are available as no custom fields/structures can be added inside of the BADI. Value change is not in this view, so I do not find a way to add this condition in the BADI. Has someone used value change with this BADI? I think it may not be possible.

An alternative is to use Restart Purchase Order Workflow using SSCUI 103345 and BAdI MMPUR_PO_WORKFLOW_RESTART. https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3053155

Customizing needs to be changed in transaction SIMG to make value change as "conditional restart".

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: convert a fixed term employed employee to a permanent...
entry.content:
Hi,

when you have hired an employee via "Add new employee for Fixed Term" this employee has already a termination record. You might need to rehire the employee after the termination date.

Regarding the contract End Date field: The control of the visibility is done via Business Rule onChange of the Contract type. You might need to check that business rule, if the permanent related contract type is listed there to set the visibility to hide for the contract end date field.

 

BR,

Sandra

entry.title: Re: Early Warning System Set up (EWS) in SAP MM/WM
entry.content: That is yet another great feature sadly gone from S/4HANA.

entry.title: Re: Depreciation area 01 does not manage values for reval...
entry.content:
Hi Misaki,

 

If this error messages occurs the underlying AssetValuationView settings do not allow the value type of revaluation. Thus, the desired transaction cannot be posted in this local GAAP. If you consider this to be an error, please create a support ticket for the country version where you experience the issue and ask for clarification. They will check and decide on the next steps where Expert Configuration will not be an option.

Best regards,

 Mick

entry.title: Single Sign On Query
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We want to implement SSO fr our customer on RISE, with multiple systems - SAP GUI, FIORI Apps, SF, C4C etc.

What's the best method. Please suggest.

Regards,

Debadata

entry.title: Re: URL attachments for Purchase Order
entry.content:
Hello,
What if we want Directly the URL on PO approval screen in My inbox

SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Enable Now error upload of potentially dangerous cont...
entry.content: Go to Tools > Settings > Producer > General, and deselect the Forbid Active Content checkbox.

entry.title: Re: Translation Solution
entry.content: Google Translate will let you cut/paste...

entry.title: Re: MF50-Planning table basic step
entry.content: Is there any possible way to add the Hours in Period view of MF50. In the Period there are only Days, Weeks, Months and Shifts are available.

entry.title: Re: READ method not executing in RAP Web API V4
entry.content:
that's normal.

eml read will hit your read method.

odata query is hitting the cds if I am not wrong.

entry.title: Re: What is the purpose of recognition and re-recognition...
entry.content:
That sounds like an exam question.

To ensure that SAP Enable Now can accurately and consistently identify elements on the screen. (So if the Author assigns a Hotspot (or Control in a Simulation) to a specific element on the screen, that same exact element can be found during playback.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Integration: How to use Password Credentials for Outbound Request
entry.content:
Hi Carlos,

I am using the option3 to connect to a 3rd party application which works only with grant_type as password.

However on testing the connection in the destination window, I get the following message.

While in the IFlow, I get the error as 

java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Access Token was not found in the response, cause: java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Access Token was not found in the response

Can you help what could be an issue?

entry.title: Re: Intermittent Login Issues with Trainer
entry.content: Likely to be a response time issue - the browser is timing out the request before it has received a response from the server. Try increasing the response time limits in Manager, and/or the browser timeout limits in the Registry (there's a SAP Note on this - 2390539).

entry.title: Track record changes done via ImpEx
entry.content:
If someone logs in to HAC, changes something via Impex do we have trace of this who did the changes like we have in BO as last changes?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Track record changes done via ImpEx
entry.content: Changes done to the records via ImpEx can't be tracked in Backoffice using "Last Changes" list. However such changes can be tracked using Generic Audit if that particular type was enabled for auditing.
